fail.message: The cloud configuration version ({{cloud}}) is newer than your local version ({{local}}). Please update the extension and try again.
fail.title: Cloud Sync Failed

legacyFormat.title: Legacy cloud sync data detected
legacyFormat.message: The cloud sync format has changed in this version. Existing cloud data is incompatible. Clear old cloud data and reinitialize sync with this device's current data.

conflict.title: Cloud sync conflict
conflict.message: Both cloud and this device have unsynced changes. Choose which version to keep.
